raw_response:
{
  "communicative_function": "affirmative self-declaration and intention-setting that enacts and reinforces desired relational states",
  "implicit_claims": [
    "mutuality is an attainable and chosen state in relationships",
    "the speaker possesses the capacity to remain stable without collapse",
    "others are capable of meeting the speaker authentically",
    "overgiving has previously functioned as a safety strategy that can now be relinquished",
    "co-regulation in truth constitutes a higher or more accurate relational mode"
  ],
  "coherence_assessment": "internally consistent; all clauses describe complementary aspects of non-collapsing, reciprocal presence without contradiction",
  "conditions_for_usefulness": "the speaker's nervous system and relational field actually support the claimed states, and repetition strengthens rather than bypasses embodied capacity",
  "conditions_for_misleading": "the statements function as spiritual bypassing or identity performance that conceals ongoing collapse, one-sided giving, or unexamined power dynamics"
}
